examples: Time doth transfix the flourish set on youth.
The value and system of civil law need transfix with culture of civil law.
As a result the Mountain Bull will lose its temper: it will summon the Wolf and then transfix the Ass and the Goat with its horn.
On the walls 1, 000 dolls--each a model known as "Blythe"--transfix the intruder with their enormous goggle-eyes.
The novelty and drama of Americans Elect is likely to transfix the political chattering class throughout the Spring and Summer.
